fields.name: Client Id
fields.tooltip: Specifies the client ID for the app.

fields.name: State
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the app is enabled or disabled.

fields.name: App ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the app ID of the extension.

fields.name: App Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the app name of the extension.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the app. The description will be automatically added in the User Name field of the card the first time the app is enabled.

fields.name: Contact Information
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contact information of the app.
